description: Motor winding temperature above SOP limit
recommended_action: Reduce load and check cooling airflow
Check lube pump and filter blockage
Inspect impeller and inlet guide vanes
Verify damper position and sensor calibration
Lock crane for brake inspection before next lift

description: Encoder signal dropout on hoist axis
recommended_action: Inspect cable chain and encoder coupling
Check belt load and motor ventilation
Verify suction strainer and valve position
